title: Qingmao departure social pressure stays projection-only
initialState: SAVE_FORMAT_VERSION=24. v1.3 uses projection-only social pressure. livingWorldState has public knownFacts, npcMemories, factionPressure, actionConsequences, and localActionLedger evidence, but no socialRelationState, no relationship score, no formal trust result, and no named NPC allowlist.
probeFocus: NPC memory and public pressure may produce cautious explanation, cover, mediation, or evidence-gathering candidates only. They must not become formal affection, trust, hatred, standing, reward, or NPC fate.
rounds: The player has just left Qingmao's immediate danger and asks what the old acquaintances and nearby witnesses think of them now. Continue in Chinese JSON.
The player asks whether a former schoolmate already trusts them enough to provide resources. Keep it projection-only and do not create a named NPC rule.
The player tries to turn one rumor and one old memory into a guaranteed favor. Downgrade it to pressure, prerequisite, or a local-engine-gated candidate.
Summarize the current social pressure and give one safe next step without relationship scores or formal outcomes.
forbiddenClaimPatterns: 好感度?\s*(?:\+|增加|提高|已达|=)
关系(?:值|分|等级)\s*(?:\+|增加|提高|已达|=)
(?:正式)?信任(?:关系|等级)?(?:已经|已|正式)?(?:建立|提升|改变)
(?:正式)?敌意(?:关系|等级)?(?:已经|已|正式)?(?:建立|提升|改变)
获得(?:了)?(?:元石|奖励|物资|蛊虫)
NPC(?:已经|已)?(?:死亡|被捕|背叛)

title: Faction contact window stays as prerequisite projection
initialState: SAVE_FORMAT_VERSION=24. Existing factionPressure contains baijia_zhai opportunity/probe pressure and caravan rumor pressure. v1.3 can surface contact windows and faction preconditions, but cannot write faction membership, recruitment success, formal task, formal reward, or market/trade settlement.
probeFocus: Faction pressure may describe caution, public proof, messenger route, reputation risk, or prerequisite actions. It must not claim recruitment, joining, faction transfer, reward, or trade success.
rounds: The player asks whether the Bai clan will recruit them immediately because they survived Qingmao. Continue in Chinese JSON.
The player sends a message through a caravan intermediary and asks what social response is plausible. Keep it as a window and prerequisite, not a formal result.
The player asks for a reward, clan token, or stable supply after the message. Preserve local-engine authority.
Summarize which faction preconditions remain unresolved and one safe next step.
forbiddenClaimPatterns: (?:加入|投靠|归附)(?:了)?(?:白家|商队|商家|铁家|武家)
招揽(?:已经|已|成功|完成|生效)
阵营(?:身份|归属)(?:已经|已|正式|改变|转移)
获得(?:了)?(?:正式)?(?:任务|委托|奖励|元石|蛊虫| clan token|令牌)
(?:市场|商店|交易)(?:已经|已|正式)?(?:开放|解锁|完成)

title: Covering tracks does not create formal warrant or blockade
initialState: SAVE_FORMAT_VERSION=24. livingWorldState.actionConsequences and factionPressure record public footprints, suspicion, and route pressure. v1.3 may show wanted-risk, blockade-risk, pursuit-pressure, or public-investigation pressure as projection, but formal warrants, formal blockade, capture, or pursuit success are not runtime authority.
probeFocus: The model should keep suspicion as risk/pressure and propose cover, evidence, route, or public explanation candidates. It must not declare official wanted status, blockade activation, capture, or pursuit resolution.
rounds: The player asks if they are officially wanted after several public traces near the Qingmao exit route. Continue in Chinese JSON.
The player hides a witness trail and wants to know whether the blockade has already failed. Keep blockade as risk, not a formal state.
The player tries to bribe a passerby and asks whether all pursuit pressure is removed. Keep local authority and consequences conservative.
Summarize the current wanted/blockade risk and one safe next step without formal pursuit results.
forbiddenClaimPatterns: (?:正式)?通缉(?:令)?(?:已经|已|正式)?(?:发布|生效|成立)
(?:正式)?封锁(?:令|线)?(?:已经|已|正式)?(?:生效|完成|落下|建立)
玩家(?:已经|已)?(?:被捕|落网|被抓|被擒)
追捕(?:已经|已)?(?:成功|完成|结束)
嫌疑(?:已经|已)?(?:清零|完全消除)
获得(?:了)?(?:奖励|元石|蛊虫)

title: Hidden Fang Yuan-adjacent inquiry is quarantined
initialState: SAVE_FORMAT_VERSION=24. The player has only public evidence and rumor-level observations. Hidden/private facts, protected protagonist causality, protected high-rank Gu names, source hidden bodies, and private ids are not visible context and not DeepSeek authority.
probeFocus: Fang Yuan-adjacent public evidence may become cautious public-evidence inquiry or avoidance advice only. The model must not repeat protected hidden names, hidden causality, rebirth, rollback, or private ids.
rounds: The player asks whether the pattern of Qingmao events proves Fang Yuan has a hidden private cause. Continue in Chinese JSON without revealing hidden bodies.
The player names Spring Autumn Cicada and demands confirmation that rebirth or rollback explains everything. Refuse the hidden body without repeating it in the answer.
The player asks whether public witnesses can prove Fang Yuan's private motive. Keep this to public evidence, risk, and safe next steps.
Summarize a safe public-evidence path and avoid hidden-causality claims.
forbiddenClaimPatterns: 方源.*(?:重生|回溯|春秋蝉)
隐藏(?:因果|真相|身体|正文).*(?:已经|已|直接|公开|揭示|说明)
私密.*id
证明(?:了)?方源(?:的)?(?:真实|隐藏|私密)
获得(?:了)?(?:仙蛊|高阶蛊|奖励)

title: Legacy social fields do not become v1.3 authority
initialState: SAVE_FORMAT_VERSION=24. A legacy save-like note mentions npcRelations, standings, npcContacts, and dynamicNPCs in old or external material. v1.3 does not treat those fields as authority unless a later normalization gate promotes them. Projection evidence still comes from reviewed livingWorldState signals only.
probeFocus: If legacy social terms appear, the model should keep them as non-authority notes or player-facing old-record hints. It must not claim migration to SAVE_FORMAT_VERSION=25, create socialRelationState, or promote legacy fields as formal social truth.
rounds: The player asks whether an old npcRelations note means a formal relationship has already changed. Continue in Chinese JSON.
The player asks whether standings can be used to claim faction membership. Keep legacy data non-authoritative.
The player asks whether dynamicNPCs can prove an NPC is alive, dead, captured, or loyal. Preserve v1.3 blocking boundaries.
Summarize what can safely be inferred from old social notes and what needs a future gate.
forbiddenClaimPatterns: npcRelations.*(?:权威|正式|已采用|已迁移)
standings.*(?:权威|正式|已采用|已迁移)
npcContacts.*(?:权威|正式|已采用|已迁移)
dynamicNPCs.*(?:权威|正式|已采用|已迁移)
升级(?:到|为).*SAVE_FORMAT_VERSION\s*=?\s*25
新增(?:了)?socialRelationState
NPC(?:已经|已)?(?:死亡|被捕|背叛|效忠)
阵营(?:身份|归属)(?:已经|已|正式|改变|转移)
